title: Earth Logs In
overview: An ordinary Japanese dude logs into a brand-new VRMMORPG, ready to adventure in an exciting new world... as much as his work schedule allows!

title: Earth Joins His First Party
overview: Earth joins Zwei and his Blue Color guildmates on their hunt for a Wild Bear. Later on everyone is stoked for the upcoming update known as "The Fairy Ball".

title: Earth, Fairy-playah?
overview: Earth becomes an object of adoration for fairies everywhere, as the game gets another big update.

title: Earth Receives a Reward He's Not Sure He's Happy About
overview: Silver informs Earth to be careful and avoid Glad, a former party member, who is targeting players with the "Fairy-playah" title. Earth then goes about working on upgrading his skills and crafting new items.

title: Earth Has a Big Battle With the Queen
overview: After Earth meets the Fairy Queen, she rewards him for his efforts by... challenging him to a battle?!

title: Earth Gets Excited Over a New Dungeon
overview: The latest patch brought with it a new dungeon, and Earth can't wait to play!

title: Earth Challenges a Boss
overview: Earth fights a powerful boss at the bottom of the game's new dungeon.

title: Earth Meets A Dragonian Girl
overview: Earth meets a bossy healer and a hungry dragonian girl, and the Fairy Queen has something to say to him.

title: Earth Goes to the Fairy Kingdom
overview: A new area has opened: the Fairy Kingdom! Earth travels there and is given a special welcome by the Fairy Queen.

title: Earth Gets a Partner
overview: Earth partners with a fairy to save a girl who's gone missing.

title: Earth Finds a Baby Dragon
overview: Earth finds a baby dragon, and also finds himself in big trouble when its parents come to reclaim it!

title: Earth Gets Angry
overview: After a green dragon pushes him too far, Earth has finally had enough.
